nodes.label: Value
nodes.description: Unscaled control value input (arbitrary range, no normalisation)

nodes.label: Broadcast to Peers
nodes.description: Sends raw value to all local_cable_unscaled nodes with the same LocalId

nodes.label: Recursion Guard
nodes.description: Prevents feedback loops when receiving values from peer cables

nodes.label: Modulation Output (Unnormalised)
nodes.description: Forwards raw value to connected parameter targets without range conversion
